response.justification: Candidate is a solid full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators), but falls far short of a Principal/Director-level IC role. Resume shows ~13-14 years of professional experience (not the required 15+), no demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms at scale, no evidence of advising strategic customers, and no track record of director-level technical leadership or recognized AI expertise. Titles are Senior/Staff at small-to-mid companies, not Principal-level strategic influence.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Some recent AI-adjacent work on MCP code generators and agentic developer tooling at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship habits (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and community teaching
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized expertise required for an AI Strategy Principal role
Seniority gap: highest title is Staff at a small company; no Principal/Director-level strategic IC track record
No evidence of advising strategic customers/partners or operating as a cloud/AI thought leader externally

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI-built products
Seniority and scope below Principal/Director IC bar
